# MuleSoft Agent Visualizer

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (master) of Agent Visualizer documentation.
> See [Agent Visualizer llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/agent-visualizer/llms-full.txt) for all the Agent Visualizer documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Agent Visualizer Components](https://docs.mulesoft.com/agent-visualizer/agent-visualizer-components.md)
- [Agent Visualizer Glossary](https://docs.mulesoft.com/agent-visualizer/agent-visualizer-glossary.md)
- [Agent Visualizer Release Notes](https://docs.mulesoft.com/agent-visualizer/agent-visualizer-release-notes.md)
- [Agent Visualizer Overview](https://docs.mulesoft.com/agent-visualizer/index.md): Agent Visualizer maps your enterprise agent network in real time, showing connections between agents, MCP servers, LLMs, and external platforms including Amazon Bedrock, Microsoft Copilot, and Google Vertex AI.
- [Governing Nodes in Agent Visualizer](https://docs.mulesoft.com/agent-visualizer/node-governance.md)
- [Troubleshooting Your Agent Network in Agent Visualizer](https://docs.mulesoft.com/agent-visualizer/troubleshoot-agent-network.md)
- [Viewing and Navigating Your Agent Network in Agent Visualizer](https://docs.mulesoft.com/agent-visualizer/view-and-navigate-agent-network.md)
